issues: Model tried to solve scheduling mentally instead of writing code
fjsp-schedule: precedence violations (job 2 ops out of order) and downtime overlap on machine 2
job-makespan: machine conflicts (multiple ops assigned to machine 0 at overlapping times)

results.description: Added directive to write Python script with template - but template had bugs
issues: Template had buggy comparison logic causing LSP type errors
Model copied template verbatim, got stuck in infinite LSP error fix loop
fjsp-schedule: model produced no output (0 tokens)
job-makespan: model spent all steps trying to fix type errors, never ran script

results.description: Rewrote with clean, correct, minimal Python solver template
changes: Simplified greedy algorithm: iterate total_ops times, pick operation with earliest completion
Used simple arrays (job_ready, next_op_idx) instead of dicts to avoid type issues
Removed confusing comparison logic - just compare end times directly
Eliminated all potential unbound variable issues
Added explicit step-by-step process: read, write script, run script, verify

keyInsight: devstral-small cannot reliably solve FJSP scheduling mentally - it makes arithmetic and constraint errors. Providing a clean, correct Python solver template that it can copy and run via python3 yields perfect scores. The template must be free of type issues since opencode's LSP will flag them and the model gets stuck in fix loops.
